title: Just Enough Repair Materials (JERM)
description: adds automatic JEI integration for anvil repair recipes
body: ## How it works The information about repair materials is dynamically pulled directly from Armor Material & Item Tier properties. This ensures seamless, out-of-the-box compatibility with the vast majority of modded armors and tools, provided they define their repair ingredients using standard Vanilla / Mod loader methods ![Gif showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c826dc345a4c28355fe4077105574fa21516964.gif)
